name: 道の駅 夕陽が丘そとめ
desc: 遠藤周作文学館に隣接し、長崎屈指の美しさと言われる夕陽が眺望できる長崎市唯一の道の駅。伝統柑橘「ゆうこう」の加工品やド・ロ様そうめんが名物。
descEn: Nagasaki City's only roadside station, next to the Shusaku Endo Literary Museum, with views of one of the region's most beautiful sunsets. Known for products made with the traditional yuko citrus and De Rotto-style somen noodles.
